description: Sector overlay for pharmaceutical manufacturing, importation, distribution, pharmacy practice, drug registration, clinical trials, medical devices, and regulated-health-product documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Pharmaceutials. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Public Health Act, 2012 (Act 851) / FDA Ghana mandate
primary_sources.issuer: Food and Drugs Authority / Ministry of Health

primary_sources.name: Pharmacy Act, 1994 (Act 489) / Pharmacy Council Ghana mandate

rules.title: FDA product registration, inspection, or authorisation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for FDA Ghana registration, product approval, inspection, clinical trial authorisation, medical-device, medicine, or regulated-product evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FDA Ghana Drug Registration & Inspection mandate

rules.title: Pharmacy Council premises, professional, or practice-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Pharmacy Council registration, pharmacist licence, pharmacy premises, professional conduct, or practice standards evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Drug quality, safety monitoring, or traceability evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for GMP, quality assurance, batch number, expiry date, safety monitoring, adverse event, recall, or traceability evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FDA Ghana mandate under Public Health Act, 2012 (Act 851)

rules.title: Patient, customer, trial-subject, or employee data-protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for data protection, consent, health information, trial-subject confidentiality, retention, or security controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
